sentences.text: "Guardian of the Minoan Maze"
A guard of the Minos Labyrinth, who kept his pledge even after the kingdoms fall.
He has blocked off intruders who covered the kingdoms heritage for a century with an unusually huge arm.
Legends from the Land of Dawn say that the Western Desert's Minoan Kingdom possesses a mysterious labyrinth.
In the maze is a statue of giant minotaur, which the people consider to be the mecca of the Minoan Kingdom.
Some say that there is a group of mercenaries who guard the entire maze.
The Kingdom produced a lot of precious jade, which brought the Minoan people great wealth.
Very quickly, the entire kingdom was lost in the intoxicating allure of gems.
Even many mercenaries, tasked with guarding the sacred maze become corrupted, abandoning their duty.
Only one stayed―Aldous, who had never forgotten his duty and guard the Minoan Labyrinth.
Until one day, a god came from the heavens to punish these lands.
The powers of light and dark decimated the entire Minoan Kingdom, which even Aldous could not escape.
The two streams dark and light energy surged into his body.
Aldous thought he was about to die.
However, the two streams of energy collided, causing great changes to his body.
His skin grew long-black scales that could resist most attacks and monstrously large arms that could easily strike fear into people's hearts.
When Aldous awoke from his daze, he found his people's kingdom all gone and the mysterious maze was now sealed by some unknown force.
The remaining minotaurs decided that Aldous would stay to defend the maze, while the others travel across the Land of Dawn to find answers.
News of a mysterious force sealing the Minoan Maze spread quickly to the Abyssal Kingdom.
To gather this strange energy, Selena decided to bring her Abyssal Demons with her to the entrance of the Minoan Maze―A huge battle was about to begin.

templates.name: Contract: Transform
templates.description: After every 2, Aldous gains a 500 (+3 × stack count)  for 3 seconds on his next . This effect can only be triggered once every 5 seconds.

templates.formula: {\rm extra\ physical\ damage} = 5 \times no.\ of\ stacks
templates.raw: {\rm extra\ physical\ damage} = 5 \times no.\ of\ stacks

templates.name: Contract: Soul Steal
templates.description: Aldous unleashes his inner energy to enhance his next Basic Attack to kill enemies and absorb their soul each stack gives to deal equal to  plus 5 times the number of Soul Steal stacks. If this attack kills an [ Lord/Turtle/ ] enemy hero/[enemy turret/]Siege Minion/other-non hero unit, Aldous will gain [12/12/10/10/10/4] stacks of  (up to 650 stacks). The enhanced Basic Attack deals 300% extra Base Damage to Minions and Creeps. Aldous gets extra 5/2 stack) when a nearby enemy Siege Minion/other non-hero unit dies.
templates.notes:
*The enhanced basic attack lasts for 5 seconds or until it is consumed.
*Cooldown starts upon casting the skill, but the skill cannot be used again until the enhanced basic attack is consumed or expired.
*Aldous charges towards a target when attacking using his enhanced basic attack.
*The enhanced basic attack's base damage and extra damage do not critically strike.
*Gain stack when dying enemies have available.

templates.formula: \rm{base\ damage} = \bigl[80 + (20 \times skill\ level) \bigr] + \bigl[(40 + 10 \times skill\ level) \times skill\ duration \bigr]
templates.raw: \rm{base\ damage} = \bigl[80 + (20 \times skill\ level) \bigr] + \bigl[(40 + 10 \times skill\ level) \times skill\ duration \bigr]

templates.formula: {\rm stun\ duration} = 0.5 s + (0.25 s \times skill\ duration)
templates.raw: {\rm stun\ duration} = 0.5 s + (0.25 s \times skill\ duration)

templates.name: Contract: Explosion
templates.description: Aldous assumes a defensive stance, gaining 30% Damage Reduction and 20% extra Movement Speed for 2 seconds or until manual cancellation. He then deals – to nearby enemies and stuns them for 0.5–1 second(s) (scales with defensive stance duration).

templates.name: Contract: Chase Fate
templates.description: Aldous gains vision of all enemy heroes for 5 seconds. During this time, if Aldous uses this skill again, he can dash toward an enemy hero [of choice]. When Aldous hits that enemy hero, he will deal and knock back the target for 1 second. (Aldous can interrupt target's  [and ] during the dash.) [Use this skill once again to cancel the dash, and will blink to the designated direction instead.]
templates.notes:
*With the perfect timing, it is possible to interrupt Aldous from dashing using 's or 's .
*The dash can only be interrupted by suppressed.
*He can freely use equipments and battle spells.
*Inside 's domain, he cannot lock on enemies outside and ongoing travel is cancelled.
**Likewise, he cannot select targets inside the domain, and does not pursue further when arriving in the target's last location.

lists.text: The name Aldous is a boy's name of English origin meaning "old." Aldous has long been associated with British writer Huxley, author of Brave New World.
His voice line "Abandon hope, all ye who enter here." is a direct reference to Dante's quote in Inferno.

While still in development Aldous' first given name and hero title was Armstrong, Gravekeeper. It was later changed to Aulrad, Contractor. However, in Patch 1.2.78, his name was changed again to Aldous.
Aldous "Red Mantle" refers to his former appearance without his damaged body.

Aldous is the sole survivor of the divine punishment that devastated the Agelta Drylands. He was blessed by the Twilight Orb, which not only saved his life but also granted him immense power, granting him strength nearly equal to that of Gods or Supreme beings.
Aldous is one of only two heroes capable of harnessing the power of the Twilight Orb, the other being is.
